description:
Spotify to Teams Status Sync

Automatically syncs your currently playing Spotify track to your Microsoft Teams status message. Set a custom status message using placeholders like {artist}, {track}, {album}, and {emoji}.
What's Changed
- ci(frontend): run cargo test --lib to materialise ts-rs codegen before svelte-check by @Carme99 in #124
- refactor(commands): split commands.rs into 7 per-workflow modules (#76, #79) by @Carme99 in #122
- ci(frontend): clear stale ts-rs generated files before cargo test by @Carme99 in #125
- refactor: extract Tokens/Polling/PendingAuths/Config sub-structs (#80 step 2) by @Carme99 in #120
- refactor(polling): dedup into poll_once/state/loop modules (#72) by @Carme99 in #123
- refactor: ts-rs codegen for SpotifyTokens/TeamsTokens/SyncStatus/AppConfig (#78) by @Carme99 in #121
- chore(release): bump version to 2.7.5 by @Carme99 in #126
Full Changelog: v2.7.4...v2.7.5
